topic: Too much self-reflection is linked to anxiety and depression.

framework.structure: ['If someone does'] + [Specific Observable Behaviour] + ['they are'] + [Hidden Intent]
framework.trigger: Social threat detection — invisible manipulation the viewer didn't see coming
framework.example: If someone mirrors your body language in the first 30 seconds, they are running a dominance test on you.

script.hook: If someone mirrors your body language in the first 30 seconds, they are running a dominance test on you.
script.body: Psychologists have known this for decades but it never makes it into mainstream education. The people who use this have an unfair advantage in every conversation.

full_script_text: If someone mirrors your body language in the first 30 seconds, they are running a dominance test on you. <break time="0.8s"/> Psychologists have known this for decades but it never makes it into mainstream education. The people who use this have an unfair advantage in every conversation. What do you think?

visual_direction.kling_prompt: extreme close-up eyes in deep shadow, single side light source, no full faces, 9:16 vertical cinematic, psychological thriller, deep shadows

caption_text: If someone mirrors your body language in the first 30 seconds, they are running
